title: BeaconRanger
description: BeaconRanger is a very lightweight plugin to change the beacon range.
body:
## Description:
This plugin allows you to customize the range of beacons on your server! Whether you want to increase or decrease the effects of beacons, AdjustableBeaconRange gives you full control.

### Features:

- Adjustable beacon range via the configuration file.
 
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x.
 
- Supports both Paper and Folia for optimal performance on modern servers.
 
- Easy to configure, no complicated commands required.

Use Case:
Want your main build to benefit from beacon effects over a larger area? With AdjustableBeaconRange, you can set the range exactly how you want it!
